    29вҶ’    // жңҖе°ҸеҲҶж®өеӨ§е°ҸпјҲ1MBпјҢе°ҸдәҺжӯӨж–Үд»¶дёҚеҲҶж®өпјү

    32вҶ’    /**

    37вҶ’        val totalBytes: Long,

    40вҶ’        val segmentIndex: Int,
    41вҶ’        val totalSegments: Int
    42вҶ’    )

    44вҶ’    /**
    45вҶ’     * дёӢиҪҪй…ҚзҪ®

    47вҶ’    data class DownloadConfig(
    48вҶ’        val url: String,
    49вҶ’        val outputFile: File,
    50вҶ’        val segmentSize: Long = SEGMENT_SIZE,
    51вҶ’        val enableResume: Boolean = true,
    52вҶ’        val onProgress: (DownloadProgress) -> Unit = {}

    62вҶ’            // иҺ·еҸ–ж–Үд»¶еӨ§е°Ҹ

    69вҶ’
    70вҶ’            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "File size: $fileSize bytes")

    72вҶ’            // еҲӨж–ӯжҳҜеҗҰйңҖиҰҒеҲҶж®ө

    74вҶ’                Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "File too small for segmentation, using simple download")

    89вҶ’                loadResumeState(tempFile)
    90вҶ’            } else {
    91вҶ’                mutableSetOf()
    92вҶ’            }
    93вҶ’
    94вҶ’            var totalDownloaded = 0L
    95вҶ’            val startTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
    96вҶ’
    97вҶ’            for (i in 0 until segmentCount) {
    98вҶ’                if (i in downloadedSegments) {
    99вҶ’                    Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Segment $i already downloaded, skipping")
   100вҶ’                    totalDownloaded += minOf(config.segmentSize, fileSize - i * config.segmentSize)

   102вҶ’                }

   131вҶ’                    saveResumeState(tempFile, downloadedSegments)

   133вҶ’                }
   134вҶ’            }
   135вҶ’
   136вҶ’            raf.close()

   139вҶ’            if (config.outputFile.exists()) {
   140вҶ’                config.outputFile.delete()
   141вҶ’            }
   142вҶ’            tempFile.renameTo(config.outputFile)
   143вҶ’
   144вҶ’            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Download completed: ${config.outputFile.absolutePath}")
   145вҶ’            Result.success(config.outputFile)
   146вҶ’        } catch (e: Exception) {
   147вҶ’            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Download failed", e)
   148вҶ’            Result.failure(e)
   149вҶ’        }
   150вҶ’    }

   152вҶ’    /**
   153вҶ’     * з®ҖеҚ•дёӢиҪҪпјҲдёҚж”ҜжҢҒеҲҶж®өпјү
   154вҶ’     */
   155вҶ’    private suspend fun simpleDownload(config: DownloadConfig): Result<File> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   156вҶ’        try {
   157вҶ’            val request = okhttp3.Request.Builder()
   158вҶ’                .url(config.url)
   159вҶ’                .build()
   160вҶ’
   161вҶ’            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   162вҶ’
   163вҶ’            if (!response.isSuccessful) {
   164вҶ’                throw IOException("HTTP ${response.code}")
   165вҶ’            }
   166вҶ’
   167вҶ’            val body = response.body ?: throw IOException("No response body")
   168вҶ’            val inputStream = body.byteStream()
   169вҶ’            val totalBytes = body.contentLength()
   170вҶ’            var downloadedBytes = 0L
   171вҶ’            val startTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   172вҶ’
   173вҶ’            config.outputFile.outputStream().use { output ->
   174вҶ’                val buffer = ByteArray(8 * 1024)
   175вҶ’                var bytes: Int
   176вҶ’
   177вҶ’                while (inputStream.read(buffer).also { bytes = it } > 0) {
   178вҶ’                    output.write(buffer, 0, bytes)
   179вҶ’                    downloadedBytes += bytes
   180вҶ’
   181вҶ’                    val elapsed = (System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime) / 1000.0
   182вҶ’                    val speed = if (elapsed > 0) (downloadedBytes / elapsed).toLong() else 0
   183вҶ’
   184вҶ’                    if (totalBytes > 0) {
   185вҶ’                        config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   186вҶ’                            bytesDownloaded = downloadedBytes,
   187вҶ’                            totalBytes = totalBytes,
   188вҶ’                            percent = ((downloadedBytes * 100) / totalBytes).toInt(),
   189вҶ’                            speed = speed,
   190вҶ’                            segmentIndex = 1,
   191вҶ’                            totalSegments = 1
   192вҶ’                        ))
   193вҶ’                    }
   194вҶ’                }
   195вҶ’            }
   196вҶ’
   197вҶ’            Result.success(config.outputFile)
   198вҶ’        } catch (e: Exception) {
   199вҶ’            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Simple download failed", e)
   200вҶ’            Result.failure(e)
   201вҶ’        }
   202вҶ’    }
   203вҶ’
   204вҶ’    /**
   205вҶ’     * дёӢиҪҪеҚ•дёӘеҲҶж®ө
   206вҶ’     */
   207вҶ’    private fun downloadSegment(
   208вҶ’        url: String,
   209вҶ’        file: File,
   210вҶ’        start: Long,
   211вҶ’        end: Long,
   212вҶ’        onBytesDownloaded: (Long) -> Unit
   213вҶ’    ) {
   214вҶ’        val request = okhttp3.Request.Builder()
   215вҶ’            .url(url)
   216вҶ’            .header("Range", "bytes=$start-$end")
   217вҶ’            .build()
   218вҶ’
   219вҶ’        val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   220вҶ’
   221вҶ’        if (response.code !in 200..299) {
   222вҶ’            throw IOException("HTTP ${response.code} for segment $start-$end")
   223вҶ’        }
   224вҶ’
   225вҶ’        val inputStream = response.body?.byteStream() ?: throw IOException("No response body")
   226вҶ’        val raf = RandomAccessFile(file, "rw")
   227вҶ’        raf.seek(start)
   228вҶ’
   229вҶ’        val buffer = ByteArray(8 * 1024)
   230вҶ’        var bytes: Int
   231вҶ’        var totalBytes = 0L
   232вҶ’
   233вҶ’        while (inputStream.read(buffer).also { bytes = it } > 0) {
   234вҶ’            raf.write(buffer, 0, bytes)
   235вҶ’            totalBytes += bytes
   236вҶ’            onBytesDownloaded(bytes.toLong())
   237вҶ’        }
   238вҶ’
   239вҶ’        raf.close()
   240вҶ’        inputStream.close()
   241вҶ’    }
   242вҶ’
   243вҶ’    /**
   244вҶ’     * иҺ·еҸ–ж–Үд»¶еҶ…е®№й•ҝеәҰ
   245вҶ’     */
   246вҶ’    private fun getContentLength(url: String): Long {
   247вҶ’        return try {
   248вҶ’            val request = okhttp3.Request.Builder()
   249вҶ’                .url(url)
   250вҶ’                .head()
   251вҶ’                .build()
   252вҶ’
   253вҶ’            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   254вҶ’
   255вҶ’            // жЈҖжҹҘжҳҜеҗҰж”ҜжҢҒж–ӯзӮ№з»ӯдј 
   256вҶ’            val acceptRanges = response.header("Accept-Ranges") == "bytes"
   257вҶ’            val contentLength = response.body?.contentLength() ?: 0
   258вҶ’
   259вҶ’            if (acceptRanges && contentLength > 0) {
   260вҶ’                contentLength
   261вҶ’            } else {
   262вҶ’                0
   263вҶ’            }
   264вҶ’        } catch (e: Exception) {
   265вҶ’            Log.w("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to get content length", e)
   266вҶ’            0
   267вҶ’        }
   268вҶ’    }
   269вҶ’
   270вҶ’    /**
   271вҶ’     * дҝқеӯҳж–ӯзӮ№зҠ¶жҖҒ
   272вҶ’     */
   273вҶ’    private fun saveResumeState(file: File, segments: Set<Int>) {
   274вҶ’        try {
   275вҶ’            val stateFile = File(file.absolutePath + ".resume")
   276вҶ’            stateFile.writeText(segments.joinToString(","))
   277вҶ’        } catch (e: Exception) {
   278вҶ’            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to save resume state", e)
   279вҶ’        }
   280вҶ’    }
   281вҶ’
   282вҶ’    /**
   283вҶ’     * еҠ иҪҪж–ӯзӮ№зҠ¶жҖҒ
   284вҶ’     */
   285вҶ’    private fun loadResumeState(file: File): MutableSet<Int> {
   286вҶ’        return try {
   287вҶ’            val stateFile = File(file.absolutePath + ".resume")
   288вҶ’            if (stateFile.exists()) {
   289вҶ’                val content = stateFile.readText()
   290вҶ’                if (content.isNotBlank()) {
   291вҶ’                    content.split(",").mapNotNull { it.toIntOrNull() }.toMutableSet()
   292вҶ’                } else {
   293вҶ’                    mutableSetOf()
   294вҶ’                }
   295вҶ’            } else {
   296вҶ’                mutableSetOf()
   297вҶ’            }
   298вҶ’        } catch (e: Exception) {
   299вҶ’            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to load resume state", e)
   300вҶ’            mutableSetOf()
   301вҶ’        }
   302вҶ’    }
   303вҶ’
   304вҶ’    /**
   305вҶ’     * жё…зҗҶж–ӯзӮ№зҠ¶жҖҒ
   306вҶ’     */
   307вҶ’    fun clearResumeState(file: File) {
   308вҶ’        try {
   309вҶ’            val stateFile = File(file.absolutePath + ".resume")
   310вҶ’            if (stateFile.exists()) {
   311вҶ’                stateFile.delete()
   312вҶ’            }
   313вҶ’            val tempFile = File(file.absolutePath + ".tmp")
   314вҶ’            if (tempFile.exists()) {
   315вҶ’                tempFile.delete()
   316вҶ’            }
   317вҶ’        } catch (e: Exception) {
   318вҶ’            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to clear resume state", e)
   319вҶ’        }
   320вҶ’    }
   321вҶ’
   322вҶ’    /**
   323вҶ’     * еҸ–ж¶ҲдёӢиҪҪе№¶жё…зҗҶдёҙж—¶ж–Үд»¶
   324вҶ’     */
   325вҶ’    fun cancelDownload(outputFile: File) {
   326вҶ’        clearResumeState(outputFile)
   327вҶ’    }
   328вҶ’}

   166вҶ’                    downloadSegment(config.url, tempFile, start, end) { bytes ->
   167вҶ’                        totalDownloaded += bytes
   168вҶ’                        val elapsed = (System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime) / 1000.0
   169вҶ’                        val speed = if (elapsed > 0) totalDownloaded / elapsed.toLong() else 0
   170вҶ’
   171вҶ’                        config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   172вҶ’                            bytesDownloaded = totalDownloaded,
   173вҶ’                            totalBytes = fileSize,
   174вҶ’                            percent = ((totalDownloaded * 100) / fileSize).toInt(),
   175вҶ’                            speed = speed,
   176вҶ’                            segmentIndex = i + 1,
   177вҶ’                            totalSegments = segmentCount
   178вҶ’                        ))
   179вҶ’                    }
   180вҶ’
   181вҶ’                    downloadedSegments.add(i)
   182вҶ’                    saveResumeState(tempFile, downloadedSegments)
   183вҶ’                } catch (e: Exception) {

   185вҶ’                    raf.close()
   186вҶ’                    // дҝқеӯҳж–ӯзӮ№дҝЎжҒҜ
   187вҶ’                    saveResumeState(tempFile, downloadedSegments)
   188вҶ’                    throw e
   189вҶ’                }
   190вҶ’            }
   191вҶ’
   192вҶ’            raf.close()
   193вҶ’
   194вҶ’            // йҮҚе‘ҪеҗҚдёәжңҖз»Ҳж–Үд»¶
   195вҶ’            if (config.outputFile.exists()) {
   196вҶ’                config.outputFile.delete()

   198вҶ’            tempFile.renameTo(config.outputFile)
   199вҶ’
   200вҶ’            Log.d("SegmentedDownloader", "Download completed: ${config.outputFile.absolutePath}")
   201вҶ’            Result.success(config.outputFile)

   208вҶ’    /**
   209вҶ’     * з®ҖеҚ•дёӢиҪҪпјҲдёҚж”ҜжҢҒеҲҶж®өпјү
   210вҶ’     */
   211вҶ’    private suspend fun simpleDownload(config: DownloadConfig): Result<File> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   212вҶ’        try {
   213вҶ’            val request = okhttp3.Request.Builder()
   214вҶ’                .url(config.url)
   215вҶ’                .build()
   216вҶ’
   217вҶ’            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   218вҶ’
   219вҶ’            if (!response.isSuccessful) {
   220вҶ’                throw IOException("HTTP ${response.code}")
   221вҶ’            }
   222вҶ’
   223вҶ’            val body = response.body ?: throw IOException("No response body")
   224вҶ’            val inputStream = body.byteStream()
   225вҶ’            val totalBytes = body.contentLength()
   226вҶ’            var downloadedBytes = 0L
   227вҶ’            val startTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   228вҶ’
   229вҶ’            config.outputFile.outputStream().use { output ->
   230вҶ’                val buffer = ByteArray(8 * 1024)
   231вҶ’                var bytes: Int
   232вҶ’
   233вҶ’                while (inputStream.read(buffer).also { bytes = it } > 0) {
   234вҶ’                    output.write(buffer, 0, bytes)
   235вҶ’                    downloadedBytes += bytes
   236вҶ’
   237вҶ’                    val elapsed = (System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime) / 1000.0
   238вҶ’                    val speed = if (elapsed > 0) (downloadedBytes / elapsed).toLong() else 0
   239вҶ’
   240вҶ’                    if (totalBytes > 0) {
   241вҶ’                        config.onProgress(DownloadProgress(
   242вҶ’                            bytesDownloaded = downloadedBytes,
   243вҶ’                            totalBytes = totalBytes,
   244вҶ’                            percent = ((downloadedBytes * 100) / totalBytes).toInt(),
   245вҶ’                            speed = speed,
   246вҶ’                            segmentIndex = 1,
   247вҶ’                            totalSegments = 1
   248вҶ’                        ))
   249вҶ’                    }
   250вҶ’                }
   251вҶ’            }
   252вҶ’
   253вҶ’            Result.success(config.outputFile)
   254вҶ’        } catch (e: Exception) {
   255вҶ’            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Simple download failed", e)
   256вҶ’            Result.failure(e)
   257вҶ’        }
   258вҶ’    }

   260вҶ’    /**
   261вҶ’     * дёӢиҪҪеҚ•дёӘеҲҶж®ө
   262вҶ’     */
   263вҶ’    private fun downloadSegment(
   264вҶ’        url: String,
   265вҶ’        file: File,
   266вҶ’        start: Long,
   267вҶ’        end: Long,
   268вҶ’        onBytesDownloaded: (Long) -> Unit
   269вҶ’    ) {
   270вҶ’        val request = okhttp3.Request.Builder()
   271вҶ’            .url(url)
   272вҶ’            .header("Range", "bytes=$start-$end")
   273вҶ’            .build()
   274вҶ’
   275вҶ’        val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   276вҶ’
   277вҶ’        if (response.code !in 200..299) {
   278вҶ’            throw IOException("HTTP ${response.code} for segment $start-$end")
   279вҶ’        }
   280вҶ’
   281вҶ’        val inputStream = response.body?.byteStream() ?: throw IOException("No response body")
   282вҶ’        val raf = RandomAccessFile(file, "rw")
   283вҶ’        raf.seek(start)
   284вҶ’
   285вҶ’        val buffer = ByteArray(8 * 1024)
   286вҶ’        var bytes: Int
   287вҶ’        var totalBytes = 0L
   288вҶ’
   289вҶ’        while (inputStream.read(buffer).also { bytes = it } > 0) {
   290вҶ’            raf.write(buffer, 0, bytes)
   291вҶ’            totalBytes += bytes
   292вҶ’            onBytesDownloaded(bytes.toLong())
   293вҶ’        }
   294вҶ’
   295вҶ’        raf.close()
   296вҶ’        inputStream.close()
   297вҶ’    }
   298вҶ’
   299вҶ’    /**
   300вҶ’     * иҺ·еҸ–ж–Үд»¶еҶ…е®№й•ҝеәҰ
   301вҶ’     */
   302вҶ’    private fun getContentLength(url: String): Long {
   303вҶ’        return try {
   304вҶ’            val request = okhttp3.Request.Builder()
   305вҶ’                .url(url)
   306вҶ’                .head()
   307вҶ’                .build()
   308вҶ’
   309вҶ’            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   310вҶ’
   311вҶ’            // жЈҖжҹҘжҳҜеҗҰж”ҜжҢҒж–ӯзӮ№з»ӯдј 
   312вҶ’            val acceptRanges = response.header("Accept-Ranges") == "bytes"
   313вҶ’            val contentLength = response.body?.contentLength() ?: 0
   314вҶ’
   315вҶ’            if (acceptRanges && contentLength > 0) {
   316вҶ’                contentLength
   317вҶ’            } else {
   318вҶ’                0
   319вҶ’            }
   320вҶ’        } catch (e: Exception) {
   321вҶ’            Log.w("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to get content length", e)
   322вҶ’            0
   323вҶ’        }
   324вҶ’    }

   326вҶ’    /**
   327вҶ’     * дҝқеӯҳж–ӯзӮ№зҠ¶жҖҒ
   328вҶ’     */
   329вҶ’    private fun saveResumeState(file: File, segments: Set<Int>) {
   330вҶ’        try {
   331вҶ’            val stateFile = File(file.absolutePath + ".resume")
   332вҶ’            stateFile.writeText(segments.joinToString(","))
   333вҶ’        } catch (e: Exception) {
   334вҶ’            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to save resume state", e)
   335вҶ’        }
   336вҶ’    }

   338вҶ’    /**
   339вҶ’     * еҠ иҪҪж–ӯзӮ№зҠ¶жҖҒ
   340вҶ’     */
   341вҶ’    private fun loadResumeState(file: File): MutableSet<Int> {
   342вҶ’        return try {
   343вҶ’            val stateFile = File(file.absolutePath + ".resume")
   344вҶ’            if (stateFile.exists()) {
   345вҶ’                val content = stateFile.readText()
   346вҶ’                if (content.isNotBlank()) {
   347вҶ’                    content.split(",").mapNotNull { it.toIntOrNull() }.toMutableSet()
   348вҶ’                } else {
   349вҶ’                    mutableSetOf()
   350вҶ’                }
   351вҶ’            } else {
   352вҶ’                mutableSetOf()
   353вҶ’            }
   354вҶ’        } catch (e: Exception) {
   355вҶ’            Log.e("SegmentedDownloader", "Failed to load resume state", e)

   358вҶ’    }

   361вҶ’     * жё…зҗҶж–ӯзӮ№зҠ¶жҖҒ
   362вҶ’     */
   363вҶ’    fun clearResumeState(file: File) {
   364вҶ’        try {

   375вҶ’        }

   378вҶ’    /**
   379вҶ’     * еҸ–ж¶ҲдёӢиҪҪе№¶жё…зҗҶдёҙж—¶ж–Үд»¶
